Industries: Hardware · Pharmacies · Bodegas · Mini-markets · Construction · Factories

Accounting Management

Contaplex

// Allows up to 20,000 sales receipts per company. If exceeded, upgrade to Contaplex Empresas.

Implementation and configuration of the gas-station module. Includes adapting the module to your workflow, custom domain for the gas-station system, and modification or creation of reports. Subject to prior analysis. S/ 3,000.00 one-time setup fee.

Cost-center control
Gas Station Module
Islands, hoses and dispensers setup
Fuel configuration per island, hose and dispenser
Customer registration for gift tickets (in invoice/receipt, vouchers, end-of-month redemption)
Login/logout sessions
Open shift per island excluding already-open islands
Fuel sales with invoice, receipt and vouchers
Customer search by license plate
Sales by gallon or by soles
Multiple payment methods (Visa, Yape, Plin, etc.)
Print gift tickets after issuing receipts based on customer config
Counter logging: open/close shift recording dispenser readings
Credit voucher settlement (invoices from vouchers, Serafín gift ticket, non-billed fuel exits with print)
Cash recording (registers cash given and prints voucher)
Gift tickets: view, reprint and create new from one or many receipts
Ticket redemption: log redeemed tickets per day
Reports: daily sales (cash and deposit), credit vouchers and invoices, exportable to Excel
User control: assign permissions and security levels
Split voucher gallons across several legal entities of one client
Customer with multiple legal entities
Receivables reports by customer and by legal entity
Delivery notes with SCOP code
Redeemed receipts printed without source voucher reference

Add-on plan — when exceeding 2,000 receipts

Per-package cost for additional electronic receipts

PackageRangeUnit priceTotal
Package 1From 1 to 1,000S/ 0.030S/ 30.00
Package 2From 1,001 to 5,000S/ 0.0250S/ 125.00
Package 3From 5,001 to 10,000S/ 0.0230S/ 200.00
Package 4From 10,001 to 50,000S/ 0.0200S/ 1,000.00
Private database
  • Exclusive hosting for your customer information
  • Higher speed and response time, direct channel to RENIEC and SUNAT
  • One-time payment: S/ 1,000.00

Need help choosing the right plan?

A DGD consultant guides you on which Codeplex plan fits your volume and which implementation service you need.

Talk to a consultant
